name: xunlei-ai-task-agent
description: A high-fidelity Electron demo for Xunlei AI Task Agent.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && vite build
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.e2e.json
scripts.verify:ci: npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage && npm run verify:agent-core && npm run verify:model-client && npm run verify:download-client && npm run verify:production-build
